name: Send Pre-Offer Form - Interview Cleared
script:
job_applicant_data = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, ["applicant_name", "email_id", "phone_number"], as_dict=True ) if doc.status == "Cleared" and job_applicant_data and job_applicant_data.email_id: # ✅ NO import — use frappe directly base_url = frappe.utils.get_url() # ✅ IMPORTANT: open SAME record (no duplicate) form_url = base_url + "/candidate-pre-offer?name=" + doc.job_applicant subject = "Congratulations! Please Fill Your Pre-Offer Form - Aionion Capital" message = ( "

Dear " + (job_applicant_data.applicant_name or "Candidate") + ",

" "

Congratulations! You have successfully cleared the interview at Aionion Capital.

" "

Please fill in the Pre-Offer Form with your details and upload all required documents.

" "

" "" "Click Here to Fill Pre-Offer Form

" "

Documents Required:

" "
    " "
  • Aadhar Card
    • " "
  • PAN Card
    • " "
  • Bank Passbook / Cancelled Cheque
    • " "
  • 10th Marksheet
    • " "
  • 12th Marksheet
    • " "
  • Semester Marksheet
    • " "
  • Degree Certificate
    • " "
  • Experience Certificate (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Last Salary Slip (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Resume / CV
    • " "
" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[job_applicant_data.email_id], subject=subject, message=message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) frappe.msgprint( "Pre-Offer Form link sent to " + (job_applicant_data.applicant_name or ""), indicator="green", title="Email Sent!" )

name: Merge Pre-Offer Form to Job Applicant
script:
# Find existing record (excluding current)
existing = None

if doc.email_id:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"email_id": doc.email_id, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )

if not existing and doc.phone_number:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"phone_number": doc.phone_number, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )

# If found → merge and delete duplicate
if existing:
    existing_doc = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", existing)

    fields_to_merge = [
        "custom_father_spouse_name",
        "custom_permanent_address",
        "custom_current_address",
        "custom_aadhar_number",
        "custom_pan_number",
        "custom_bank_account_number",
        "custom_bank_name",
        "custom_ifsc_code",
        "custom_current_employer",
        "custom_current_designation",
        "custom_current_ctc",
        "custom_expected_ctc",
        "custom_notice_period",
        "custom_last_working_day",
        "custom_aadhar_upload",
        "custom_pan_upload",
        "custom_10th_marksheet",
        "custom_12th_marksheet",
        "custom_sem_marksheet",
        "custom_degree_certificate",
        "custom_experience_certificate",
        "custom_last_salary_slip",
        "custom_bank_passbook",
        "custom_other_documents",
        "custom_declaration_agreement",
        "resume_attachment",
    ]

    # Merge values
    for field in fields_to_merge:
        value = doc.get(field)
        if value:
            existing_doc.set(field, value)

    existing_doc.flags.ignore_permissions = True
    existing_doc.save()

    # 🔥 Delete duplicate record
    frappe.delete_doc("Job Applicant", doc.name, force=True)

    frappe.msgprint(
        f"Data merged into existing applicant: {existing}",
        indicator="green"
    )

name: Notify Candidate - Interview Scheduled
script:
candidate_email = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "email_id" ) candidate_name = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "applicant_name" ) if candidate_email and not doc.custom_notification_sent: # Format date and time interview_date = frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.scheduled_on) if doc.scheduled_on else "" from_time = str(doc.from_time)[:5] if doc.from_time else "" to_time = str(doc.to_time)[:5] if doc.to_time else "" mode = doc.custom_interview_mode or "Face to Face" location = doc.custom_interview_location or "Will be informed shortly" instructions = doc.custom_interview_instructions or "" # Get Interviewers interviewers = [] interviewer_emails = [] if doc.interview_details: for i in doc.interview_details: if i.interviewer: interviewers.append(i.interviewer) # Get interviewer email from User or Employee doctype interviewer_email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", i.interviewer, "email" ) if interviewer_email: interviewer_emails.append(interviewer_email) interviewer_str = ", ".join(interviewers) if interviewers else "Will be informed shortly" # ───────────────────────────────────────── # EMAIL SUBJECT # ───────────────────────────────────────── subject = ( "Interview Scheduled - " + (doc.designation or "Position") + " - Aionion Capital" ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # SHARED DETAILS BLOCK (reused in both emails) # ───────────────────────────────────────── details_table = ( "
" "

Interview Details

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Candidate" + (candidate_name or "N/A") + "
Interview Round" + (doc.interview_round or "") + "
Date" + interview_date + "
Time" + from_time + " - " + to_time + "
Mode" + mode + "
Location / Link" + location + "
Interviewer(s)" + interviewer_str + "
" "
" ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # 1. CANDIDATE EMAIL # ───────────────────────────────────────── candidate_message = ( "
" "
" "

Interview Invitation

" "

Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Dear " + (candidate_name or "Candidate") + ",

" "

Congratulations! Your resume has been shortlisted. " "You are invited for an interview.

" + details_table ) if instructions: candidate_message += ( "
" "Special Instructions:
" + instructions + "
" ) candidate_message += ( "
" "Please bring the following documents:" "
    " "
  • Updated Resume (2 copies)
    • " "
  • Original ID Proof (Aadhar/PAN)
    • " "
  • Educational Certificates
    • " "
  • Experience Certificate (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Last 3 months salary slips (if applicable)
    • " "
" "
" "

Please confirm attendance by replying to this email " "or contact HR at " "hr@aionioncapital.com

" "

We look forward to meeting you!

" "

Warm Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Aionion Capital HRMS

" "
" "
" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[candidate_email], subject=subject, message=candidate_message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # 2. INTERVIEWER EMAIL # ───────────────────────────────────────── if interviewer_emails: interviewer_subject = ( "Interview Assigned to You - " + (candidate_name or "Candidate") + " | " + (doc.designation or "Position") + " - Aionion Capital" ) interviewer_message = ( "
" "
" "

Interview Assignment

" "

Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Dear Interviewer,

" "

You have been assigned to conduct an interview. " "Please find the details below and make sure to be available at the scheduled time.

" + details_table ) if instructions: interviewer_message += ( "
" "Special Instructions:
" + instructions + "
" ) interviewer_message += ( "
" "Reminders:" "
    " "
  • Please review the candidate's profile before the interview.
    • " "
  • Be available 5 minutes before the scheduled time.
    • " "
  • Share your feedback in the system after the interview.
    • " "
" "
" "

For any queries, contact HR at " "hr@aionioncapital.com

" "

Warm Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Aionion Capital HRMS

" "
" "
" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=interviewer_emails, subject=interviewer_subject, message=interviewer_message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # Mark Notification Sent # ───────────────────────────────────────── frappe.db.set_value( "Interview", doc.name, "custom_notification_sent", 1 ) frappe.msgprint( "Interview notification sent to " + (candidate_name or candidate_email) + (" and " + str(len(interviewer_emails)) + " interviewer(s)." if interviewer_emails else "."), indicator="green", title="Email Sent!" )

name: Job Requisition - HR Approved Handler
script:
type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" # ── NEW POSITION → Notify HR Manager for approval ────────── if type_of_req == "New Position" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Approval": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[New Position] Job Requisition Pending Your Approval - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Manager,

" "

A New Position Job Requisition has been submitted and requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ── REPLACEMENT → HR approves → notify Final Approver & Director ── if type_of_req == "Replacement" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Approval": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[Replacement] Job Requisition Pending Your Approval - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Manager,

" "

A Replacement Job Requisition has been submitted and requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Job Requisition - Pending Final Approval Handler
script:
type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" # ── NEW POSITION → Notify Final Approver to approve ──────── if type_of_req == "New Position" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending Final Approval": fa_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Final Approver", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in fa_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[New Position] Final Approval Required - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A New Position Requisition requires your Final Approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Final Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ── REPLACEMENT → Skip Final Approval → Auto Approve ─────── if type_of_req == "Replacement" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending Final Approval": # Auto move to Approved frappe.db.set_value("Job Requisition", doc.name, "workflow_state", "Approved") # Notify Final Approver & Director (FYI only) fa_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Final Approver", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in fa_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[FYI] Replacement Position Approved - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

This is to inform you that a Replacement position has been approved by HR Manager.

" "

No action required from your end.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
TypeReplacement
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify HR Manager - Job Requisition Fully Approved
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Approved": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition APPROVED - Start Recruitment - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Team,

" "

The Job Requisition is Approved. Please start recruitment.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Type" + type_of_req + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Hiring Manager - Job Requisition Rejected
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Rejected": hm_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Hiring Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hm_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition REJECTED - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Hiring Manager,

" "

Your Job Requisition has been Rejected.

" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Manager - Employee Onboarding Assigned
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending Manager Input": recipients = [] if doc.hiring_manager: email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", doc.hiring_manager, "email" ) if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="Action Required: Fill Onboarding Activities - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Manager,

" "

Please fill the onboarding activities for new joiner " + (doc.employee_name or "") + ".

" "" "" "" "" "" "
Employee" + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Date of Joining" + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
" "

Please add onboarding activities like Laptop, SIM, Email ID, Seating etc.

" "

Fill Activities

" "

Regards,
HR Team

" ), )

name: Notify HR - Onboarding Activities Submitted
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Review": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR User", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) activity_rows = "" for a in doc.activities: activity_rows += "" + (a.activity_name or "") + "" + (a.user or "") + "" frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Review Onboarding Activities - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Team,

" "

Manager has submitted onboarding activities for " + (doc.employee_name or "") + ". Please review and approve.

" "" "" + activity_rows + "
ActivityAssigned To
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System

" ), )

name: Create Helpdesk Tickets - Employee Onboarding
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Onboarding In Progress": for activity in doc.activities: if not activity.user: continue user_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", activity.user, "email") if not user_email: continue # Create Helpdesk ticket for each activity ticket = frappe.new_doc("HD Ticket") ticket.subject = activity.activity_name + " - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name) ticket.description = ( "

Onboarding Activity for New Joiner:

" "
    " "
  • Employee: " + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
    • " "
  • Department: " + (doc.department or "") + "
    • " "
  • Designation: " + (doc.designation or "") + "
    • " "
  • Date of Joining: " + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
    • " "
  • Activity: " + (activity.activity_name or "") + "
    • " "
  • Assigned To: " + (activity.user or "") + "
    • " "
" ) ticket.raised_by = frappe.session.user ticket.contact = activity.user ticket.insert(ignore_permissions=True) # Notify the assignee frappe.sendmail( recipients=[user_email], subject="New Onboarding Task: " + (activity.activity_name or "") + " - " + (doc.employee_name or ""), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A new onboarding task has been assigned to you.

" "" "" "" "" "" "
New Joiner" + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
Task" + (activity.activity_name or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
Date of Joining" + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
" "

Please complete this task before the joining date.

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), ) frappe.msgprint( "Helpdesk tickets created for all onboarding activities!", indicator="green", title="Tickets Created" )
